title: Count Ways to Make Array With Product
titleCn: 生成乘积数组的方案数

testcases.input: queries = [[2,6],[5,1],[73,660]] Output: [4,1,50734910] Explanation: Each query is independent. [2,6]: There are 4 ways to fill an array of size 2 that multiply to 6: [1,6], [2,3], [3,2], [6,1]. [5,1]: There is 1 way to fill an array of size 5 that multiply to 1: [1,1,1,1,1]. [73,660]: There are 1050734917 ways to fill an array of size 73 that multiply to 660. 1050734917 modulo 109 + 7 = 50734910.
testcases.expectedOutput: [4,1,50734910] Explanation: Each query is independent. [2,6]: There are 4 ways to fill an array of size 2 that multiply to 6: [1,6], [2,3], [3,2], [6,1]. [73,660]: There are 1050734917 ways to fill an array of size 73 that multiply to 660. 1050734917 modulo 109 + 7 = 50734910.
